title: PostingTypeValues
description:
Posting recording interest earned on a customers deposit or savings account.

Comment:
Example: €50 interest credited to a 12-month savings account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Recording the actual debit/credit in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Checking account debited €500, supplier account credited €500

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fund Transfer Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ledger entries for internal account transfer. 

Comment:
Example: Checking account debited, savings account credited

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Disbursement Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Loan account credited, cash/deposit account debited. 

Comment:
Example: Loan account credited €10,000, deposit account debited €10,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Repayment Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Customer account debited, loan account credited. 

Comment:
Example: Checking account debited €500, loan account credited €500

x-enumeration-literals.name: Principal Prepayment Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Additional principal recorded in loan account. 

Comment:
Example: Loan account credited €2,000, checking account debited €2,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Fee recorded in customer and bank accounts. 

Comment:
Example: Customer account debited €10, fee income credited €10

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Interest posted to ledger accounts. 

Comment:
Example: Interest expense credited, deposit account credited €50

x-enumeration-literals.name: Correction Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Correcting ledger entries. 

Comment:
Example: Original debit reversed in ledger

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Update ledger for new maturity or renewed product. 

Comment:
Example: Term deposit principal and interest re-posted

x-enumeration-literals.name: Salary Credit Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Debit employer account, credit employee accounts. 

Comment:
Example: Employer account debited, employee checking credited €3,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Wire Transfer Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record international or external payment in ledger.

Comment:
Example: Customer account debited, bank correspondent account credited €2,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Provision Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Funds posted to provision/reserve accounts. 

Comment:
Example: Provision account credited €500, expense account debited €500

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dividend Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record payment in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Dividend payable account debited, shareholder account credited €200

x-enumeration-literals.name: FX Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record FX gain/loss and currency movement. 

Comment:
Example: Customer USD account debited, EUR account credited, FX gain/loss posted

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record tax deduction in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Customer account debited €50, tax payable account credited €50

x-enumeration-literals.name: Capital Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record equity movement. 

Comment:
Example: Share capital account credited €10,000, cash account debited €10,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Suspense Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Hold funds temporarily in suspense ledger account. 

Comment:
Example: Suspense account credited €300

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recurring Transfer Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Post transaction per schedule. 

Comment:
Example: Debit customer account €200, credit landlord account €200

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Post overdraft to ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Customer account debited €500, overdraft liability credited €500

x-enumeration-literals.name: Card Transaction Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record card transaction in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Card account credited €150, merchant account debited €150

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Restructure Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Update loan account for new terms. 

Comment:
Example: Loan principal/interest schedules updated in ledger

x-enumeration-literals.name: Penalty Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record penalty in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Customer account debited €100, penalty income credited €100

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record collateral movement in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Collateral account credited

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment Subscription Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record recurring investment in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Customer investment account credited €500

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment Redemption Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record withdrawal/redemption in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Investment account debited €2,000, cash/deposit credited €2,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commission Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record incentive in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Bank expense account debited, agent account credited €50

x-enumeration-literals.name: Foreign Remittance Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Post interest to principal account. 

Comment:
Example: Term deposit principal credited €50, interest account debited €50

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Rollover Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Post new principal and interest schedules. 

Comment:
Example: Loan/deposit account updated with new maturity

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cheque Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Record cheque transaction in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Customer deposit account credited, cash account debited

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Debit customer account, credit utility account. 

Comment:
Example: Customer account debited €100, utility account credited €100

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Update cash and deposit accounts in ledger. 

Comment:
Example: Cash account debited, deposit account credited €1,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Capitalization Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Post interest to principal account. 

Comment:
Example: Term deposit principal credited €50, interest account debited €50
